name: discover-wsl-projects
prompt: Use $wsl-fs to discover likely WSL projects and report the distro plus Linux repo paths.
expected_output: A list of discovered WSL projects with distro and Linux path information.

expectations.text: The final message mentions which distro was used.
The final message includes Linux-style project paths.

name: resolve-project-name
prompt: Use $wsl-fs to resolve a WSL project name to the best distro and repo root, then report both Linux and Windows-visible paths.
expected_output: A resolved distro and project root with both Linux and translated Windows paths.

expectations.text: The final message includes a Linux path.
The final message includes a Windows-visible path.

name: exec-in-repo
prompt: Use $wsl-fs to find a WSL project and run a command inside its repo root rather than from PowerShell.
expected_output: A result that makes it clear the command ran inside the resolved WSL repo.

expectations.text: The final message references the repo command that was run.
